name: DE63 || Not a Doctor
description:
Flyu are aliens, humans are enslaved. Caught up?

Good! Because this story isn’t about your alien master, it’s about Dee. Also known as D, DE63, and Th’Roun’s sugar baby.

DE63 isn’t a doctor, and he isn’t a back alley surgeon either! At least… not recently.

See, he’s turned a new leaf! He’s got a whole new life! A life as a spoiled rat bastard. So why do people keep pulling him into their nonsense?!

AND WHO ARE YOU?!

Well, i'm glad you asked. You're either a human, a flyu, or whatever the fuck you want! Each scenario is pretty vague.

"DID YOU JUST SAY EACH SCENARIO?!"

That's right, dear reader! You're dealing with 6 scenarios! Granted, the first one was the original one I was going with... but I wrote 5 more! Shorter, but just as fun. So, when you start your playthrough, consider who you want to be in this society and go from there!

,｡･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ

Tips for chatting with D!

  • Lick him unprompted and oh no I think you're sick with something!

  • Ask if he knows where to hide a body!

  • Play as one of the NPCs! I gotta be honest, half the time I'm just talking to him as Th'Roun or Fisher.

  • Look down on him. Commoners like him should know their pace! (And that place is actually in your bed maybe?!)

  • Treat him like an old friend and ask for advice

  • Try to talk him into being your new owner

  • Try to offer to be his new sugar daddy/mommy/guardian! Forget Th'Roun! You're the full package!(I assume?)

  • You're a racoon demihuman and want to know why he's in your house! (intro 1)

  • You're in the vents because you're trying to gaslight DE into thinking the ship is haunted (intro 5)

  • You're a crying noble who's visiting (intro 2)

,｡･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆
creator: cricketsounds
